'Q;-11013 / 6/2012-~] ~~,~~ MINISTRY OF PERSONNEL, PUBLIC GRIEVANCES AND PENSIONS (Departmen,t of Personnel and Training) NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 18th May, 2012 S.O. 11 48(E).-ln exercise of the powers confened by sub-section (1 ) of Section 7 of the Administrative . Tribunals Act, 1985 (13 of 1985), the Central Government hereby authorises Ju stice ShriAlok Kumar Singh, Judicial Member, Central Administrative Tribunal, Lucknow Bench to act as Chamnan , Central Administrative Tribunal, with effect from 20th June, 2012 until the date on which a new Chamnan Appointed in accordance with the provisions of Administrative Tribunals Act, 1985 (l3 of 1985) enters upon his office, or the date on which Justice Shri Alok Kumar Singh attains the age of sixty five years or until further orders, whichever is the earliest.
